arguments.command:
cd /tmp/sv-95e7485eec13461595ace1ae40001f10 && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

# Parse the .ips file - line 1 is header JSON, rest is body JSON
with open("ios_crash.ips") as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

header = json.loads(lines[0])
body = json.loads("".join(lines[1:]))

images = body["usedImages"]

# Collect all unsymbolicated frames from lastExceptionBacktrace and all threads
def find_unsymbolicated(frames, label):
    results = []
    for i, frame in enumerate(frames):
        if "symbol" not in frame:
            idx = frame["imageIndex"]
            offset = frame["imageOffset"]
            img = images[idx]
            base = img["base"]
            addr = base + offset
            results.append({
                "label": label,
                "frame_idx": i,
                "imageIndex": idx,
                "imageOffset": offset,
                "address": addr,
                "image_name": img.get("name", "???"),
                "image_path": img.get("path", "???"),
                "image_uuid": img.get("uuid", "???"),
                "image_base": base,
            })
    return results

all_unsym = []
all_unsym.extend(find_unsymbolicated(body["lastExceptionBacktrace"], "lastExceptionBacktrace"))
for ti, thread in enumerate(body["threads"]):
    all_unsym.extend(find_unsymbolicated(thread["frames"], f"Thread {ti}"))

# Print crash summary
exc = body["exception"]
term = body["termination"]
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  iOS CRASH LOG ANALYSIS")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print(f"  App:        {header['app_name']} v{header['app_version']} (build {header['build_version']})")
print(f"  Bundle:     {header['bundleID']}")
print(f"  OS:         {header['os_version']}")
print(f"  Device:     {body['modelCode']} (ARM-64)")
print(f"  Exception:  {exc['type']} / {exc['signal']}")
print(f"  Reason:     {term['indicator']}")
print(f"  Timestamp:  {header['timestamp']}")
print()

# Print relevant images
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  APP & RUNTIME IMAGES (source: P = on-disk)")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
app_images = {f["imageIndex"] for f in all_unsym}
# Also show image 0 (main binary) for context
app_images.add(0)
for idx in sorted(app_images):
    img = images[idx]
    print(f"  [{idx:2d}] {img.get('name','???')}")
    print(f"       UUID: {img.get('uuid','???')}")
    print(f"       Base: 0x{img['base']:X}  Size: {img.get('size',0):,} bytes")
    print(f"       Path: {img.get('path','???')}")
    print()

# Print unsymbolicated frames
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  UNSYMBOLICATED FRAMES NEEDING dSYMs")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
# Group by image
from collections import defaultdict
by_image = defaultdict(list)
for f in all_unsym:
    by_image[f["imageIndex"]].append(f)

for idx in sorted(by_image.keys()):
    img = images[idx]
    frames = by_image[idx]
    print(f"\n  Image [{idx}]: {img.get('name','???')}")
    print(f"  UUID: {img.get('uuid','???')}")
    print(f"  Base: 0x{img['base']:X}")
    print(f"  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────")
    for f in frames:
        print(f"    {f['label']} frame #{f['frame_idx']:2d}:  "
              f"offset 0x{f['imageOffset']:X}  →  addr 0x{f['address']:X}")
    print()

# dSYM guidance
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  WHERE TO FIND dSYMs")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print()
for idx in sorted(by_image.keys()):
    img = images[idx]
    name = img.get("name","???")
    uuid = img.get("uuid","???")
    print(f"  ▸ {name}  (UUID: {uuid})")
    if "SampleMAUI" in name and "Frameworks" in img.get("path",""):
        print(f"    AOT-compiled managed .NET code.")
        print(f"    Look in your build output:")
        print(f"      bin/Release/net9.0-ios/ios-arm64/SampleMAUI.app.dSYM/")
        print(f"    Or Xcode Archives:")
        print(f"      ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/Archives/<date>/*.xcarchive/dSYMs/")
        print(f"    Verify UUID match:  dwarfdump --uuid <path>/SampleMAUI.framework.dSYM")
    elif "libcoreclr" in name:
        print(f"    .NET runtime library.")
        print(f"    dSYM ships in the NuGet runtime pack:")
        print(f"      ~/.nuget/packages/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.ios-arm64/<version>/")
        print(f"        runtimes/ios-arm64/native/libcoreclr.framework.dSYM/")
        print(f"    Or from the .NET SDK:")
        print(f"      dotnet/packs/Microsoft.NETCore.App.Runtime.ios-arm64/<version>/")
        print(f"    Verify UUID match:  dwarfdump --uuid <path>/libcoreclr.framework.dSYM")
    print()

# Generate atos commands
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  atos COMMANDS")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print()
for idx in sorted(by_image.keys()):
    img = images[idx]
    name = img.get("name","???")
    uuid = img.get("uuid","???")
    base = img["base"]
    frames = by_image[idx]
    addrs = " ".join(f"0x{f['address']:X}" for f in frames)

    if "SampleMAUI" in name and "Frameworks" in img.get("path",""):
        dsym_placeholder = "<path-to>/SampleMAUI.framework.dSYM"
        binary = "SampleMAUI.framework/SampleMAUI"
    elif "libcoreclr" in name:
        dsym_placeholder = "<path-to>/libcoreclr.framework.dSYM"
        binary = "libcoreclr.framework/libcoreclr"
    else:
        dsym_placeholder = f"<path-to>/{name}.dSYM"
        binary = name

    print(f"  # {name} ({len(frames)} unsymbolicated frames)")
    print(f"  atos -o {dsym_placeholder} \\")
    print(f"       -arch arm64 \\")
    print(f"       -l 0x{base:X} \\")
    print(f"       {addrs}")
    print()
    # Also show per-frame breakdown
    print(f"  # Per-frame breakdown:")
    for f in frames:
        print(f"  #   0x{f['address']:X}  (offset 0x{f['imageOffset']:X}, {f['label']} #{f['frame_idx']})")
    print()

print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  NOTES")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  • Run on macOS with Xcode command-line tools installed.")
print("  • The -l flag is the runtime load address of the image.")
print("  • Verify dSYM UUIDs match with:  dwarfdump --uuid <dsym>")
print("  • The SampleMAUI.framework frames (imageIndex 1) are the")
print("    AOT-compiled managed code — these will resolve to your")
print("    C#/.NET method names once symbolicated.")
print("  • The crash is an abort during app launch in")
print("    -[MauiUIApplicationDelegate didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:]")
print("    triggered by xamarin_process_managed_exception — a .NET")
print("    exception was thrown and not caught during startup.")

PYEOF

Now I have all the information I need. Let me organize this:

**Key images from usedImages:**
- **Index 0**: SampleMAUI (main app binary) - base: 4306796544 (0x100B70000), uuid: 0c8adddd-a192-38f1-bc99-69e89ee24577
- **Index 1**: SampleMAUI.framework (AOT compiled .NET code) - base: 4310646784 (0x100F50000), uuid: f6b3b8c8-6799-3123-953a-d09d7ae501a4, size: 15482880


- **Index 7**: libcoreclr - base: 4332584960 (0x102400000), uuid: 87d24fda-191f-3938-8063-4c56f505eb9d, size: 4915200

Looking at the unsymbolicated frames from the exception backtrace, I can see several frames pointing to SampleMAUI.framework at different offsets that don't have symbol information attached.

I'm also noticing several frames from libcoreclr that are unsymbolicated. Now I need to check the faulting thread to see if there are any other frames without symbols, and then I'll calculate the actual addresses for the atos commands by adding each image's base address to its offset. Continuing to verify the hex conversions for the libcoreclr image offsets and double-checking the arithmetic to ensure accuracy.

I should also look at other unsymbolicated frames in the stack trace, though the user's main focus is on the .NET runtime frames. For symbolication, I'll need the dSYM files—specifically the one for SampleMAUI.framework which contains the AOT-compiled managed code from the build output, and the dSYM for libcoreclr itself.

Writing a script to analyze this...

cd /tmp/sv-95e7485eec13461595ace1ae40001f10 && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

# Parse the .ips file - line 1 is header JSON, rest is body JSON
with open("ios_crash.ips") as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

header = json.loads(lines[0])
body = json.loads("".join(lines[1:]))

images = body["usedImages"]

# Collect all unsymbolicated frames from lastExceptionBacktrace and all threads
def find_unsymbolicated(frames, label):
    results = []
    for i, frame in enumerate(frames):
        if "symbol" not in frame:
            idx = frame["imageIndex"]
            offset = frame["imageOffset"]
            img = images[idx]
            base = img["base"]
            addr = base + offset
            results.append({
                "label": label,
                "frame_idx": i,
                "imageIndex": idx,
                "imageOffset": offset,
                "address": addr,
                "image_name": img.get("name", "???"),
                "image_path": img.get("path", "???"),
                "image_uuid": img.get("uuid", "???"),
                "image_base": base,
            })
    return results

all_unsym = []
all_unsym.extend(find_unsymbolicated(body["lastExceptionBacktrace"], "lastExceptionBacktrace"))
for ti, thread in enumerate(body["threads"]):
    all_unsym.extend(find_unsymbolicated(thread["frames"], f"Thread {ti}"))

# Print crash summary
exc = body["exception"]
term = body["termination"]
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  iOS CRASH LOG ANALYSIS")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print(f"  App:        {header['app_name']} v{header['app_version']} (build {header['build_version']})")
print(f"  Bundle:     {header['bundleID']}")
print(f"  OS:         {header['os_version']}")
print(f"  Device:     {body['modelCode']} (ARM-64)")
print(f"  Exception:  {exc['type']} / {exc['signal']}")
print(f"  Reason:     {term['indicator']}")
print(f"  Timestamp:  {header['timestamp']}")
print()

# Print relevant images
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  APP & RUNTIME IMAGES (source: P = on-disk)")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
app_images = {f["imageIndex"] for f in all_unsym}
# Also show image 0 (main binary) for context
app_images.add(0)
for idx in sorted(app_images):
    img = images[idx]
    print(f"  [{idx:2d}] {img.get('name','???')}")
    print(f"       UUID: {img.get('uuid','???')}")
    print(f"       Base: 0x{img['base']:X}  Size: {img.get('size',0):,} bytes")
    print(f"       Path: {img.get('path','???')}")
    print()

# Print unsymbolicated frames
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  UNSYMBOLICATED FRAMES NEEDING dSYMs")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
# Group by image
from collections import defaultdict
by_image = defaultdict(list)
for f in all_unsym:
    by_image[f["imageIndex"]].append(f)

for idx in sorted(by_image.keys()):
    img = images[idx]
    frames = by_image[idx]
    print(f"\n  Image [{idx}]: {img.get('name','???')}")
    print(f"  UUID: {img.get('uuid','???')}")
    print(f"  Base: 0x{img['base']:X}")
    print(f"  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────")
    for f in frames:
        print(f"    {f['label']} frame #{f['frame_idx']:2d}:  "
              f"offset 0x{f['imageOffset']:X}  →  addr 0x{f['address']:X}")
    print()

# dSYM guidance
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  WHERE TO FIND dSYMs")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print()
for idx in sorted(by_image.keys()):
    img = images[idx]
    name = img.get("name","???")
    uuid = img.get("uuid","???")
    print(f"  ▸ {name}  (UUID: {uuid})")
    if "SampleMAUI" in name and "Frameworks" in img.get("path",""):
        print(f"    AOT-compiled managed .NET code.")
        print(f"    Look in your build output:")
        print(f"      bin/Release/net9.0-ios/ios-arm64/SampleMAUI.app.dSYM/")
        print(f"    Or Xcode Archives:")
        print(f"      ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/Archives/<date>/*.xcarchive/dSYMs/")
        print(f"    Verify UUID match:  dwarfdump --uuid <path>/SampleMAUI.framework.dSYM")
    elif "libcoreclr" in name:
        print(f"    .NET runtime library.")
        print(f"    dSYM ships in the NuGet runtime pack:")
        print(f"      ~/.nuget/packages/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.ios-arm64/<version>/")
        print(f"        runtimes/ios-arm64/native/libcoreclr.framework.dSYM/")
        print(f"    Or from the .NET SDK:")
        print(f"      dotnet/packs/Microsoft.NETCore.App.Runtime.ios-arm64/<version>/")
        print(f"    Verify UUID match:  dwarfdump --uuid <path>/libcoreclr.framework.dSYM")
    print()

# Generate atos commands
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  atos COMMANDS")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print()
for idx in sorted(by_image.keys()):
    img = images[idx]
    name = img.get("name","???")
    uuid = img.get("uuid","???")
    base = img["base"]
    frames = by_image[idx]
    addrs = " ".join(f"0x{f['address']:X}" for f in frames)

    if "SampleMAUI" in name and "Frameworks" in img.get("path",""):
        dsym_placeholder = "<path-to>/SampleMAUI.framework.dSYM"
        binary = "SampleMAUI.framework/SampleMAUI"
    elif "libcoreclr" in name:
        dsym_placeholder = "<path-to>/libcoreclr.framework.dSYM"
        binary = "libcoreclr.framework/libcoreclr"
    else:
        dsym_placeholder = f"<path-to>/{name}.dSYM"
        binary = name

    print(f"  # {name} ({len(frames)} unsymbolicated frames)")
    print(f"  atos -o {dsym_placeholder} \\")
    print(f"       -arch arm64 \\")
    print(f"       -l 0x{base:X} \\")
    print(f"       {addrs}")
    print()
    # Also show per-frame breakdown
    print(f"  # Per-frame breakdown:")
    for f in frames:
        print(f"  #   0x{f['address']:X}  (offset 0x{f['imageOffset']:X}, {f['label']} #{f['frame_idx']})")
    print()

print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  NOTES")
print("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════")
print("  • Run on macOS with Xcode command-line tools installed.")
print("  • The -l flag is the runtime load address of the image.")
print("  • Verify dSYM UUIDs match with:  dwarfdump --uuid <dsym>")
print("  • The SampleMAUI.framework frames (imageIndex 1) are the")
print("    AOT-compiled managed code — these will resolve to your")
print("    C#/.NET method names once symbolicated.")
print("  • The crash is an abort during app launch in")
print("    -[MauiUIApplicationDelegate didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:]")
print("    triggered by xamarin_process_managed_exception — a .NET")
print("    exception was thrown and not caught during startup.")
